flat_band_3cm.detail: 001B 3/3 flat band at n=3 does not fully persist at n=5: REPLAN success 0.8–1.0 across delays with seed variance, not a monotonic delay cliff

interaction.interpretation: No monotonic increase in delay sensitivity across tested severities

recommend_001d.rationale: Flat recoverability surface overall; 6 cm / delay 20 as mid-grid baseline (some cells 0.8 success with ~0.14 m residual dist)

source: RunPod full grid merge 2026-07-16; raw JSON on pod volume
